site.tagline: Your Path. Your Application. Your AI.
site.description: Pathly is the GDPR-compliant AI platform that optimizes your resume, cover letter, and profile so you get seen — EU-hosted, no data exploitation.

hero.headline:
Every person deserves
to be seen.
hero.subheadline: Pathly optimizes your resume, cover letter, and profile so recruiting AIs can't overlook you.

trustTicker.quote: Harvard × Accenture (2021): Millions of qualified candidates are filtered out by automated systems — not because of lack of qualifications.

problems.headline: Do you know what happens to your application before a human reads it?

01.headline: An **AI** reads your **CV** first. Recruiters spend an average of **7.4 seconds** on it.
01.body: **98%** of Fortune 500 companies use **Applicant Tracking Systems** (ATS) that rank CVs by keywords before a human ever sees them. If your CV gets through, a recruiter scans it for just 7.4 seconds, following the **F-Pattern**: job title, current role, keywords top-left. What's missing there is never read.

02.headline: A **personalized cover letter** increases interview chances by **+53%**.
02.body: A **field experiment** with **7,287** real **applications** shows: Tailored cover letters led to 53% more interview invitations. Generic copy-paste texts only brought +17%. 78% of recruiters instantly recognize AI-generated standard texts and see them as a **sign of low motivation**.

03.headline: **81–92%** of all CVs contain not a single number.
03.body: Recruiters and ATS systems prefer measurable achievements over task lists. Those who use metrics, e.g. "reduced costs by 23%", have up to **40% better chances** of getting an interview. Almost nobody does it. **34%** of recruiters explicitly cite missing numbers as a reason for rejection.

coverLetter.headline: Recruiters spot AI texts in 3 seconds. Not ours.
bullets: Done in 3 minutes. Sounds like 30 minutes of work.
Writing style analysis from your own texts — no templates.
Skeptical Hiring Manager reviews every sentence before you see it.

bullets: Practice without risk. Perform when it counts.

Response analysis after every session. Not after the rejection.

differentiation.headline: What Pathly does. What others don't.
differentiation.subline: No generic output. No US servers. No going solo.

joachim.quote: At 57, starting over isn't something you embrace lightly. I was afraid my experience would look outdated on paper. And that was exactly the problem. Pathly put it into words I wouldn't have found myself. It sounded just like me.

clara.quote: Everyone wants three years of experience. I have one. Pathly made me realize I'd been highlighting the wrong things. It sounds trivial, but it got me to a job interview.

bastian.quote: I'm not a fan of AI texts that sound like AI. But the cover letter Pathly produced sounded like me. No idea how, but it fit. Sent it twice, got two responses.

dorothea.quote: Me in front of a camera, unprepared. I never would have done that. Pathly guided me through the video letter, almost like a coaching session. Afterwards I knew what I wanted to say and why. The recruiter wrote to me that I was the only one who had genuinely surprised her.

elenor.quote: I test products for usability. Pathly read my own writing style better than I could. No 'Dear Sir or Madam'. No generic nothing. Simply me. That stayed with me for a while.

jack.quote: I once calculated how much time I invest per application. 1½ hours on average to meet my own standards. For twenty positions that would be almost a full working week. With Pathly it was one afternoon and the quality wasn't any worse.

laura.quote: After ten years of self-employment I know how to sell myself. Or so I thought. Pathly's critical eye told me my cover letter sounded like someone who prefers to work alone. That wasn't the message I wanted. And I hadn't seen it myself.

franziska.quote: 3 months applying to positions I saw on LinkedIn with 'Easy Apply'. Out of around 50, two responses came back. With Pathly quality just shows, I believe recruiters also want personal cover letters, not generic AI texts.

01.question: Where is my data stored — and does Pathly read my resume?
01.answer: Your data is stored exclusively on EU servers. Pathly is fully GDPR-compliant and NIS2-ready. Your resume is only processed to help you create better applications — never shared, sold, or used to train AI models. You can delete your data completely at any time.

02.question: Is my CV used for AI training?
02.answer: No. Your documents, texts, and personal data are never used for training AI models — neither by Pathly nor our AI partners. This is contractually guaranteed. Your application documents belong to you.

03.question: Does the cover letter really sound like me — or like AI?
03.answer: Pathly analyzes your writing style from your own texts — sentence length, word choice, tone. The generated cover letter is additionally reviewed by a Skeptical Hiring Manager critique that actively filters out generic phrases. The result sounds like you — not like a chatbot.

04.question: What makes Pathly different from other AI tools?
04.answer: Other AI tools don't know you, don't know the job, and don't know what recruiters really want to see. Pathly combines your individual profile, the specific job description, and real-time company research — creating an application that passes ATS systems while still sounding like you. Plus EU data protection, job tracking, and interview coaching in one system.

05.question: Does Pathly work for my industry?
05.answer: Yes. Pathly was designed for all professional fields — from marketing to tech to design, finance, or public service. The system adapts to your industry, career level, and goals. Career changers, returners, and people with resume gaps are also specifically supported.

06.question: What happens after the waitlist?
06.answer: Once Pathly launches into beta, you'll be among the first to receive a personal invitation via email. Beta users get full access to all features — including CV Optimizer, Cover Letter, Interview Coaching, and Job Queue. Your spot on the list is secured.

07.question: Why should I trust a new AI platform?
07.answer: Because we've experienced firsthand how frustrating the application process is — and how little existing tools really help. Pathly wasn't built to launch yet another AI wrapper, but to solve what's actually in the way: invisible barriers from ATS filters, generic texts, and no overview. Transparency and privacy aren't features — they're the foundation.

cookieConsent.title: We respect your privacy.
cookieConsent.body: We use cookies for technically necessary functions. We only set analytics cookies with your consent.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Technically required for the basic functions of the website. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the website (e.g. Vercel Analytics).
cookieConsent.noscript: This website uses technically necessary cookies.
